section_title: The communication of proposals, the acceptance of proposals, and the
content:
3. The communication of proposals, the acceptance of proposals, and the
acceptance
revocation of proposals and acceptances, respectively, are deemed to be
and
revocation made by any act or omission of the party proposing, accepting or revoking by
of proposals
which he intends to communicate such proposal, acceptance or revocation,
or which has the effect of communicating it.
